name: socialforge
description: Agency-grade social media calendar automation for Cursor — asset-first compositing, AI image generation (Vertex AI Nano Banana Pro), video generation (WaveSpeed Kling v3.0 Pro), C2PA content provenance for EU AI Act Article 50. Shared model curator (scripts/model_registry.json + resolve_model.py): image / video / vision model ids resolved via aliases (latest-image-google, latest-image-edit-google, latest-vision-google, latest-video-wavespeed, latest-video-google); deprecated ids auto-fall-forward; --model and --video-model flags accept any registered id. See docs/MODEL-CURATOR.md.
